items.title: Weekend mode
items.decision: Implemented the no-migration tone-only version for voice calls: weekend-local calls use lighter, optional prompt guidance.
items.next_step: Specify opt-in scheduling or weekend-specific call windows separately before changing planner behavior.

items.title: Urgent-email proactive calls
items.decision: Do not enable proactive calling from email classification without user preference, rate limits, and escalation rules.
items.next_step: Specify urgency classifier, allowed hours, user controls, and call dedupe behavior.

items.title: Auto-task creation from emails
items.decision: Keep manual Gmail-to-draft/task flows first; automatic task creation needs confidence thresholds and review UX.
items.next_step: Define extraction confidence, task source labels, dedupe rules, and user confirmation policy.

items.title: Notion integration
items.decision: Notion remains out of active implementation scope until OAuth, workspace mapping, and sync direction are specified.
items.next_step: Write a dedicated Notion integration spec before adding models or tools.

items.title: Google Keep integration
items.decision: Google Keep remains out of active implementation scope until API availability, OAuth scopes, and note/task mapping are specified.
items.next_step: Confirm viable API surface and add a dedicated integration spec.

items.title: Google Tasks import
items.decision: Google Tasks import remains deferred until import direction, dedupe, and recurring-task semantics are specified.
items.next_step: Write import requirements and migration/dedupe behavior.

items.title: Todoist import
items.decision: Todoist import remains deferred until OAuth, project mapping, label mapping, and recurring-task semantics are specified.
items.next_step: Write import requirements and account-linking behavior.
